title: Dorisia flavida

taxonomy: Dorisia flavida is a genus within the family Annonaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and morphological features. Further classification includes its order, Magnoliales, and the larger class Magnoliopsida. This classification system is used in botany to group and identify plant species based on shared characteristics. The Annonaceae family includes over 2,000 species of flowering plants.
